text.title: Personas Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying personas; each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Team produces 9 personas; nobody remembers them; they become wallpaper.
antipattern.fix: Cap primary at 3-5; secondary at <=2; re-cluster if more emerge.

antipattern.symptom: Personas split on age/gender; '35-year-old female manager' and '35-year-old female engineer' grouped despite opposite behaviours.
antipattern.fix: Re-cluster on goals + behaviours; demographics are descriptive, not predictive.

antipattern.symptom: Personas carry plausible-sounding quotes with no participant IDs; quotes turn out to be LLM-fabricated.
antipattern.root-cause: Agent paraphrased or invented quotes during synthesis.
antipattern.fix: Every quote requires verbatim text + participant_id; reject quotes lacking either.
